title: SOLA-Stafette
summary: SOLA-Stafette Source: asvz.ch/event/643-strecken | Raw: raw/races/sola_strecken_asvz.md Race date: May 2026 (annually, 3rd Saturday of May) Overall: 113km / 2600hm / 14 legs / Zürich area Full map & GPX: https://trackmaxx.ch/maps/?m=ec368d93-aff4-4a7e-b0a5-24b7f9683a32&view=teilnehmende > Personal leg assignment, target time, race strategy, and logistics checklist live in the events table ( propose_race_* / apply_race_* ). --- ## Route overview | # | Distance | Elevation | From → To | Difficulty | Jalons | |---|----------|-----------|-----------|------------|--------| | 1 | 3.63km | 65hm | Bucheggplatz → Hönggerberg | Easy | Yellow | | 2 | 13.67km | 160hm | Hönggerberg → Buchlern | Hard | Yellow | | 3 | 5.88km | 413hm | Buchlern → Uetliberg | Hard | Red | | 4 | 5.88km | 122hm | Uetliberg → Felsenegg | Easy | Yellow | | 5 | 13.92km | 288hm | Felsenegg → Buchlern | Very hard | Yellow | | 6 | 10.4km | 234hm | Buchlern → Hönggerberg | Hard | Red | | 7 | 4.51km | 54hm | Hönggerberg → Irchel | Easy | Yellow | | — | — | — | Zwischenziel Irchel | — | — | | 8 | 6.21km | 212hm | Irchel (restart) → Fluntern | Medium | Yellow | | 9 | 11.13km | 267hm | Fluntern → Forch | Hard | Yellow | | 10 | 8.62km | 159hm | Forch → Egg | Medium | Yellow | | 11 | 12.64km | 421hm | Egg → Zumikon | Very hard | Yellow | | 12 | 6.29km | 78hm | Zumikon → Witikon | Easy | Yellow | | — | — | — | Zwischenziel Witikon | — | — | | 13 | 4.62km | 80hm | Witikon (hunt start) → Fluntern | Easy | Yellow | | 14 | 5.59km | 65hm | Fluntern → Irchel (finish) | Easy | Yellow | --- ## Strecke 6 — Course detail (Buchlern → Hönggerberg) Route: Buchlern → Hönggerberg | 10.4km / 234hm Map/GPX: https://trackmaxx.ch/maps/?m=ec368d93-aff4-4a7e-b0a5-24b7f9683a32&view=strecke6 ### Key facts - Start: Friedhofstrasse 89, 8048 Zürich (47.38083, 8.47716) — same physical location as Strecke 3 - Jalons: RED — ignore yellow jalons on course (those belong to Strecke 2 going the other direction) - Zeitneutralisation on Zürcherstrasse: timer automatically pauses when entering the marked zone (red on SOLA-Map), resumes on exit — safety measure for traffic. - Waiting runners in 100er-Sektoren - Changing rooms/showers: Sportanlage Buchlern (at start) - Medical: Sanitätszimmer in changing room building - Clothing transport: Buchlern → Hönggerberg 10:10–12:00 (drop before start) - Catering: Restaurant in changing room building, open from 07:30 ### Character > Demanding — long leg with lots of ascent and descent; mix of natural roads and city passages on tarmac; almost exclusively in open terrain on tarmac Key implications: - Unlike legs 3/5 (forest, technical), Strecke 6 is mostly tarmac / open terrain → road running shoes are appropriate (no trail spikes needed) - Long leg at 10.4km → pacing discipline critical; not a sprint effort - 234hm net gain across 10.4km = 22.5m/km average gradient (moderate but sustained) - Mix of uphill and downhill — eccentric load on quads on descents ### Elevation Profile (from 2018 GPS — 3,091 points) | Phase | Km | Δalt | Max grade | Character | |-------|----|------|-----------|-----------| | Opening climb | 0–0.8 | +37m | +36% | Steep exit from Buchlern sports ground | | First descent | 0.8–1.2 | −28m | −35% | Technical steep descent | | Re-climb | 1.2–2.0 | +27m | +25% | Rhythm section | | Big descent | 2.0–3.6 | −90m | −47% | Very steep — quad killer | | Flat / Zürcherstrasse | 3.6–6.5 | ≈0m | <10% | Tarmac city section; neutral zone here | | Monster climb | 6.7–7.9 | +133m | +45% | Stairs/steep path to ETH plateau | | ETH plateau | 7.9–10.3 | ±15m | +45% spike ~km9.5 | Undulating, HR stays max | Start elevation: 446m.
